feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PO to show next price break quantity on item from SPP2 shows 'Invalid numeric value' error if > 1k
entry.content:
Hi All,

I've created a UDF on marketing document rows to show the next quantity price break on each item if it exists.
This works as needed up until the next quantity price break is 1,000 or more.
How can I amend the FMS too ignore the comma in the number format?

 

SELECT T0.[Amount] FROM SPP2 T0 WHERE T0.[ItemCode] =$[$38.1.0] and  T0.[CardCode] =$[$4.1.0] and  T0.[Amount] > $[$38.11.number]

 

 Screenshot showing the Volume Discounts format of the price breaks and the PO with the error.

Any advice is appriceated. Thanks.

EDIT;
I've just realised it is the UDF that is causing this, it is set as numeric type.
Manually typing 1000 is fine, while entering 1,000 shows same error.
Do I then need to set a new UDF as Alphanumeric or can the FMS be changed to remove the comma before?

entry.title: Web client does not display standard functions in Analysis data source
entry.content:
Hello there.

I have encountered an issue when configuring an Analysis view in the SAP Business One WEB client.

When accessing the definition of an analysis panel in the Web client, the list of data sources or sources is limited.

If I have many enabled queries or user tables, the list is displayed before the standard functions, so these functions do not appear to select and build system function views.

Can it be configured so that the user tables do not appear?

Can it be configured to show or not to show in this list?

It seems that it is a bug or error in the web client

In this case I only see the first 2...
Business Partners and Activities

In Spanish language

Al acceder en el cliente Web a la definición de un panel de análisis, la lista de origen o fuente de datos, está limitada.

Si tengo muchas consultas habilitadas o tablas de usuario, las lista antes que las funciones estándard, entonces no aparecen estas funciones para seleccionar y construir vistas de funciones del sistema.

¿Se puede configurar que no aparezcan las tablas de usuario?

¿Se puede configurar que ver o no ver en esta lista?

Tiene pinta que es un bug o error del cliente web

entry.title: Which report consider for Inventory valuation SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Which report exactly consider OR give a final outcome to total stock quantity and total stock valuation into SAP Business One. 

Here,  Inventory Audit Report and Inventory in Warehouse Report (Detailed) gives two values. 

Also need to understanding on Inventory Audit Report V/S Inventory in Warehouse Report (Detailed) V/S Inventory Aging Report.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: What is the size limitation for Alerts in SAP B1 V10
entry.content: What is the size limitation for alerts in SAP B1 V10 and where can we find documentation on the size limits?

entry.title: Some Business partners not visible while using exchange rate difference module
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We are using the exchange rate difference module. However, we have observed that some of the Business partners are not visible even though they have transactions in the system.
 
Kindly please suggest a solution..
 
Regards,
Krishna V

entry.title: GRPO to Landed Cost to AP Invoice query SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need a query on GRPO to Landed Cost to AP Invoice query SAP Business One

GRPO -> Landed Cost -> AP Invoice

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Which correct report showing Item cost and it's total valuation SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding on Which correct report showing Item cost and it's total valuation SAP Business One?

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Mismatch value between Inventory audit report V/S Inventory in Warehouse report SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have made two transaction GRPO and Inventory revaluation but when I was checked both report named Inventory audit report V/S Inventory in Warehouse report in details then both report showing different value of the item price.

SAP Business One,  Inventory audit report , Inventory in Warehouse report 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Last Evaluated Price Non-inventory item Formatted Search
entry.content:
Hi all,

sorry if I missed another post asking the same question but I couldn't find any:

I have some items which are non-inventory items and therefore have no Last Evaluated Price. In the general settings, we chose the Last Evaluated Price as base price for the Gross Profit calculation.

The specific items I am talking about are things like Transport Insurance or 3rd Party Handling Fees. These are simply costs charged to the customer in exactly the amount we encounter them. Hence, I'd like the Gross Profit to be precisely 0%.

Now the question: Is there a possibility to automatically use the LineTotal as GrossBuyPr but only for those specific items? I tried it with a Formatted Search but it didn't work:

SELECT CASE WHEN T0.ItemCode = '#transport' THEN T0.LineTotal ELSE T0.GrossBuyPr END as GrossBuyPr
FROM INV1 T0
WHERE T0.LineNum = $[INV1.LineNum] and T0.DocEntry = $[INV1.DocEntry]

Most thankful for any help!

entry.title: Uploaded .PDF file by DTW in OCRD Table in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to upload the all Vendors MSME Certificate file as a attachment by DTW. Can anyone suggest, how it will work?

entry.title: PDF file uploading by DTW in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear All,

I tried the DTW OCRD Template. And add the following data : 

CardCodeCardNameAttachmentEntry
CardCodeCardNameAtcEntry
VP-10056Labmech Engineers\\172.16.3.13\SBO_Mail\Attachment

But after uploading the file, DTW giving error " 1 Update Failed VP-10056 CServiceData::SetPropertyValue failed; Value must be a whole number in property 'AttachmentEntry' of 'BusinessPartner'oBusinessPartners "

can anyone suggest the solution?

entry.title: How do I trigger a User Defined Object in PostTransactionNotice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a UDO and linked UDT's to it. The example below shows and extract of the lines table:

I have created the following script in PostTransactionNotice to update an external table with changes to the status. Running the query on it's own works perfectly, but it does not trigger in PostTransactionNotice.
Do I need to change something for the PostTransactionNotice to read the Objecttype?
IF @object_TYPE = 'MRMSCC' and @transaction_type = 'U'
BEGIN
Update [MRM_CC].[dbo].[ServiceCallInformation]
set ItemStatus = UF.U_ScStatus
From
(select Code,LineID,U_ScStatus from [SAP_CCR].[dbo].[@_MRMCSCLN]
where U_ScStatus = 'Closed') UF
where Id = UF.LineId
and UF.Code = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
END

entry.title: Freight used into Delivery or AR Invoice SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have used freight into delivery note but the journal entry is not working for freight which was used into delivery note. 

The impact can work into AR Invoice only and apply only for Drawing method only.  If I have selected None option into Drawing method then freight is not working.  

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: error in the data archiving
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When trying to run the Data Archiving Wizard Utility, I get the following error messages after running for almost 10 hours:

Error while analysing data; data archiving cannot proceed

Do any of you have any experiences how to solve this problem ?

I have checked this link because the error message is the same:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/data-archiving-error/qaq-p/7867212

but not solved. I have attached the log file for you to review

Thanks

entry.title: Project Management work order in stages not showing in project overview window
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Please refer below snapshot we have assigned work order no 25 in stage 2 but it was not reflecting in project overview report.

Project overview report by right click 

Please let us know why its not showing and wht is missing in our side.

Regards,

Naresh M

+91 8838341723

nareshkumar@group-ea.com

entry.title: Including Purchase Request in Search Customization
entry.content:
Dears, 

      In the "Search Customization" in SAP Business One HANA, is there a possibility to add the "Purchase Request" along with the rest of the documents under the "AP Transaction" as per the attached screenshot. 

- If yes so please provide the steps.

entry.title: multi-currency pasting -invalid currency
entry.content:
I created a JE, fill in a foreign currency in Debit (FC) ,  a prompt " invalid currency" appeared. 

I checked : currency settings / Enable Multi-Currency transactions / exchange rate setup, they are work.

What is problem? Please advise. (This function was working fine before)

entry.title: Before AP Invoice Created Inventory out from SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have created one GRPO with 10 quantity for single item and before that GRPO AP Invoice process done, a few inventory or full inventory quantity out from SAP then what is the impact is created into SAP for Stock G/L?

SAP Business One, SAP B1, Stock G/L

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Calculated member in cross tab report
entry.content:
Hello,

I need help with performing calculations using crosstabs in Crystal Reports.

 
This Gross Margin at the bottom  is the calculated member
this is the formula that is used to  budget
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Sales"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)-
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Cost of Raw Materials"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)
this is the formula that is used to calculate total Actual 
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Sales"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)-
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Cost of Raw Materials"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)
this is the formula that is used to calculate total Variance
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Sales"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)-
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Cost of Raw Materials"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)
 
Now I want to calculate the total variance% by dividing the total variance by the total budget value.
(259,160.47)/455,926.85=(0.57).How can I do this?

entry.title: Purpose use of Offset account SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

What is the purpose of Offset account to use into SAP B1? 

For example, Offset account which was used in Issue for production which was clear during Receipt from Production?

Offset account use, SAP Business One, SAP B1

Regards,

Nikunj
